title: Easy Sit Anywhere
body:
This datapack only works in __23w03a (1.19.4)__ onwards!
# Easy Sit Anywhere
This is a datapack that lets you sit anywhere you want!

It's very simple, just **look directly downwards for two seconds** and you will sit down at your position

When you have decided you no longer want to sit down, then press the sneak button (shift by default) to stop sitting down.

## Information
This datapack only works in 23w03a (1.19.4) or newer versions because it uses the /ride command which was added in this version.
